name: Grand Mode — the world, 2001 onward
description: The whole board: ~20 fragile and contested states across every theater, the post-2001 age of franchising insurgency and consolidating autocracy. The global norms layer is LIVE here (DESIGN §21): your way of war — kinetic, lawful, or authoritarian — sets a precedent that ripples into every theater at once. Systems sandbox at world scale; not history-calibrated like Scenario 1 (that's a later milestone).
seat: United States (global reach) — France/EU seat and others to follow
notes: v0.10 foundation: a meaningful global slice, not yet all ~45 nodes. Node count, markets, and multi-patron rivalry deepen in follow-up milestones.
